response.justification: Candidate is a strong hands-on software craftsman with ~14 years of polyglot full-stack experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP) at re:cinq. However, the role demands a Director-level individual contributor with 15+ years, recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI strategy leadership — none of which are evidenced in the resume. Career trajectory is Senior/Staff IC at small-to-mid companies, not Principal/Director-level technical leadership advising strategic customers on AI adoption.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices at scale
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, public talks, workshops, and open-source platform ownership (GISCollective)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized expertise required for a Principal AI Strategy role
Seniority gap: Senior/Staff IC track record does not match Director-level Principal Engineer scope
Limited cloud-platform strategy experience and no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping future-state cloud products

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Seniority/scope mismatch vs. Director-level IC expectation
Recent MCP and AI-agent tooling work
